description: VERIFIED LIVE: 网易新闻 (NetEase News) via its public JSONP article-list API (no login, no key) — structured + paginated, preferred over DOM. 3g.163.com returns a JSONP-wrapped { <section>: [articles] } (the extension auto-unwraps the artiList(...) wrapper). Each article has docid, title, source, ptime, digest. Open an article at https://www.163.com/news/article/<docid>.html. Tested live by Claude Code: 20 articles for the 头条 section.

tools.name: netease_news_list
tools.description: Articles in a 网易 section. Returns a JSONP-wrapped object keyed by the section id, whose value is an array of articles (docid, title, source, ptime, digest). Open an article at https://www.163.com/news/article/<docid>.html. Common section: BBM54PGAwangning (头条/推荐). VERIFIED (20 articles).

params.name: section
params.description: Section id; BBM54PGAwangning = 头条/推荐.
